remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of charge counters on CARDNAME. Put one of those cards into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep or whenever you cast a blue spell, put a charge counter on CARDNAME.
At the beginning of your upkeep or whenever you cast a blue spell, put a charge counter on CARDNAME.
